# claude-forge

> Verify before you code — forge catches spec errors before they become debugging sessions.

forge is a CLI tool for Claude Code that structures the spec → verify → implement cycle. It plugs into Claude Code's lifecycle hooks to provide isolated verification, state tracking across sessions, and completion gates.

## Install

```bash
# Homebrew
brew tap imtemp-dev/tap && brew install forge

# Or one-line install
curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/imtemp-dev/claude-forge/main/install.sh | bash

# Or from source (Go 1.22+)
git clone https://github.com/imtemp-dev/claude-forge.git && cd claude-forge && make install
```

## Initialize

```bash
cd your-project
forge init .
claude   # start Claude Code
```

This deploys skills, hooks, and rules to `.claude/` and creates `.forge/` for state management.

## Recipes

Recipes are structured workflows. Start one inside Claude Code:

```
/forge-recipe-blueprint add OAuth2 authentication
/forge-recipe-fix login bcrypt hash comparison fails
/forge-recipe-debug session drops after 5 minutes
/forge-recipe-design auth system architecture
/forge-recipe-analyze existing codebase
```

| Type | Purpose | Lifecycle |
|------|---------|-----------|
| blueprint | New feature (full spec → code) | discover → scope → research → wireframe → draft ←→ (assess/improve/verify/debate/simulate/audit) → finalize → implement ←→ test → simulate(code) → review → sync → complete |
| fix | Known bug | diagnose → fix-spec → implement ←→ test → complete |
| debug | Unknown bug | 6-perspective analysis → cross-reference → fix-spec → implement ←→ test → complete |
| design | Feature design (spec only) | research → draft ←→ verify → finalize |
| analyze | System understanding (spec only) | research → draft ←→ verify → finalize |

## Phases

Blueprint phases in order:
`discovery` → `scoping` → `research` → `wireframe` → `draft` → `assess` → `improve` → `verify` → `debate` → `simulate` → `audit` → `finalize` → `implement` → `test` → `review` → `sync` → `status` → `complete`

Implementation phases (shared across blueprint, fix, debug):
`implement` → `test` → `simulate`(code) → `review` → `sync` → `status` → `complete`

## File Structure

```
.forge/
├── config/              # git tracked — settings, template version
│   ├── settings.yaml
│   └── .template-version
├── specs/               # git tracked — recipe specs, project docs
│   ├── vision.md
│   ├── roadmap.md
│   ├── project-status.md
│   ├── project-map.md
│   ├── debates/{id}/        # project-level debates (meta.json + rounds)
│   └── recipes/{id}/
│       ├── recipe.json         # recipe state (id, type, topic, phase)
│       ├── intent.md           # discovery output
│       ├── scope.md            # scoping output
│       ├── wireframe.md        # structure design
│       ├── draft.md            # working spec
│       ├── final.md            # finalized spec (Level 3)
│       ├── manifest.json       # document relationships
│       ├── changelog.jsonl     # action log
│       ├── verify-log.jsonl    # verification history
│       ├── tasks.json          # implementation tasks
│       ├── test-results.json   # test results
│       ├── deviation.md        # spec-code differences
│       ├── review.md           # code review findings
│       ├── diagnosis.md        # fix/debug: root cause
│       ├── fix-spec.md         # fix/debug: change spec
│       ├── debates/{id}/       # recipe-level debates
│       └── simulations/        # simulation results
└── local/               # gitignored — runtime data
    ├── metrics.jsonl
    ├── work-state.json
    └── recipes/{id}/metrics.jsonl
```

## CLI Reference

```
forge init [dir]              Initialize project (--force to reinitialize)
forge doctor [recipe-id]      System and recipe health check (--strict)
forge validate [recipe-id]    JSON schema compliance check
forge verify <file>           Document consistency and level assessment (--no-code)
forge recipe status           Show active recipe
forge recipe list             List all recipes
forge recipe create           Create recipe (--type blueprint|fix|debug|design|analyze --topic "...")
forge recipe log <id>         Record action/phase/iteration (--phase, --action, --output, --force)
forge recipe cancel           Cancel active recipe
forge stats [recipe-id]       Metrics and cost estimation (--json, --csv)
forge graph [recipe-id]       Document relationship graph (--all)
forge sync-check [recipe-id]  Verify documents are in sync
forge debate list|log|resume|export   Manage debates
forge update                  Update templates to match binary version
forge version                 Show versions
```

## Skills (21)

Inside Claude Code, invoke skills with `/skill-name`:

| Skill | Purpose |
|-------|---------|
| /forge-recipe-blueprint | Full spec-to-code lifecycle |
| /forge-recipe-design | Design spec (Level 2) |
| /forge-recipe-analyze | Analysis spec (Level 1) |
| /forge-recipe-fix | Bug fix with diagnosis |
| /forge-recipe-debug | Multi-perspective debugging |
| /forge-discover | Intent discovery conversation |
| /forge-wireframe | Structure design with mermaid diagrams |
| /forge-research | Codebase and external research |
| /forge-verify | Logical verification (fork context) |
| /forge-cross-check | Internal consistency check (fork context) |
| /forge-audit | Completeness audit (fork context) |
| /forge-assess | Level assessment and next-action decision |
| /forge-sync-check | Document synchronization check (fork context) |
| /forge-debate | Structured 3-expert debate |
| /forge-adjudicate | Evaluate debate conclusions |
| /forge-simulate | Scenario walkthrough — document or code (fork context) |
| /forge-implement | Code generation from finalized spec |
| /forge-test | Test generation and execution |
| /forge-review | Multi-perspective code review (fork context, 3 parallel agents) |
| /forge-sync | Sync spec with implementation |
| /forge-status | Project status aggregation |

## Models

Main session model handles: drafting, implementing, debating, orchestrating.

Fork context agents handle verification and review (separate AI instance, no shared conversation history):

| Agent | Default | Setting |
|-------|---------|---------|
| verifier | sonnet | agents.verifier |
| auditor | sonnet | agents.auditor |
| simulator | session model | agents.simulator |
| reviewer_quality | sonnet | agents.reviewer_quality |
| reviewer_security | sonnet | agents.reviewer_security |
| reviewer_arch | sonnet | agents.reviewer_arch |

Configure in `.forge/config/settings.yaml`.

## Completion Gates

Specs complete when: verification.md exists, verify-log last entry shows critical=0 major=0. Output `<forge>DONE</forge>`. This sets phase to `finalize`.

Implementation completes when: all tasks done, tests pass, review.md exists, deviation.md exists. Output `<forge>IMPLEMENT DONE</forge>`.

Fix completes when: fix-spec.md exists, tests pass. Output `<forge>FIX DONE</forge>`.

## Key Rules

1. Every document modification triggers /forge-verify immediately after.
2. Verification runs in separate agent context (never self-review).
3. Edit draft.md in place (Edit tool), don't rewrite.
4. Log every action: `forge recipe log {id} --action [type] --output [path]`.
5. Run /forge-simulate at least once before Level 3.
6. Run /forge-adjudicate after every debate.
7. Run /forge-sync-check before finalizing.
8. Deviations are reports, not gates — they don't block completion.

## Document Levels

- Level 1 (Understanding): components listed, relationships explained, tech stack specified
- Level 2 (Design): data flow, error handling, interfaces, rationale for choices
- Level 3 (Implementation-ready): every file path, function signature, type, edge case, test scenario specified

---
forge version: 0.2.0
